_comment: GitHub MCP server (official, Go). Canonical run is the Docker image; the PAT is passed via the GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN env var (set it from your environment, e.g. ${GITHUB_TOKEN}) — do NOT commit a literal token. Alternatives: legacy npm `@modelcontextprotocol/server-github` via bunx, or the remote OAuth endpoint https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/. Merge into .claude/settings.json (Claude Code) or claude_desktop_config.json (Claude Desktop).
